name: Ovation Science Inc.
summary: Ovation Science Inc. engages in the production of cannabis or hemp products in Canada. The company's Invisicare is a patented drug delivery technology for use in topical and transdermal skin products containing hemp seed oil and cannabis products under the Ovation brand. It holds sublicenses for cannabis based products in Canada and in the United States; and Lighthouse for licensed dispensaries in the United States. The company was founded in 2017 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
